Who We Are

Supporting Tarrant County's
Future Leaders

The Tarrant Ag Scholarship Corporation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to raising funds that provide scholarships to Tarrant County's 4-H and FFA high school seniors.

Our sole objective is to invest directly into local youth — students who demonstrate hard work, service, confidence, and resiliency through their involvement in agricultural programs.

$300K+
Awarded in scholarships since 2007

Each year, scholarship recipients are highlighted at our annual fundraising gala, where all proceeds go directly to benefiting future scholarships. The evening features dinner, dancing, a live auction, and raffle.

To be eligible, applicants must have exhibited at the Tarrant County Jr. Livestock Show, ensuring funds are kept local and distributed to the youth of Tarrant County.

EST. 2007
Serving Tarrant County youth for over 15 years

For Applicants

Scholarship Rules
& Application

Applications are available to active 4-H or FFA members who are graduating seniors in 2026 and have participated in the Tarrant County Jr. Livestock Show. Review the full rules and download the application below.
